prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion model. Historical daily log returns for COST over the past 1 year (252 trading days) were used to estimate the annualized drift (mu=0.2994) and volatility (sigma=0.1630). The point estimate is the expected price in 21 days based on this drift. The confidence intervals are derived from the log-normal distribution implied by the Geometric Brownian Motion, using the estimated volatility and standard Z-scores for each confidence level. This model assumes log returns are normally distributed and that the estimated parameters will remain constant over the prediction horizon. All prices are rounded to two decimal places.
